Beginner Bouldering Session

Our Beginner Bouldering Session runs every Tuesday and Thursday evening and is designed for first-time climbers who want a friendly, low-pressure introduction to the sport. Sessions are led by certified instructors who cover movement basics, falling safely onto the mats, and how to read a route before you leave the ground.

The drop-in price is $24 per person and includes shoe and chalk rental, so you can show up with nothing but comfortable clothes. Each session lasts ninety minutes, starting at 6:30pm and wrapping up by 8:00pm, with the last fifteen minutes reserved for cool-down stretches and questions with the coaching team.

Groups are capped at twelve climbers to keep the instructor-to-participant ratio high. If you want to reserve a spot ahead of time you can register online, though walk-ins are welcome whenever space allows. Returning climbers often move on to our intermediate technique clinic, which builds on the fundamentals introduced here.

Parking is free after 6:00pm in the lot behind the building, and the front desk can point you toward the changing rooms and water refill stations. We recommend arriving ten minutes early for your first visit so staff can size your rental shoes and walk you through the waiver.
